package.name: hexa_gait_cpp
package.description: C++ port of hexa_gait: the stateful gait engine that turns a commanded body velocity into per-leg foot targets. Owns the phase clock and the FOLDED/INITIALIZE/STAND/ENGAGING/GAIT/PAUSING/PAUSED/RESUMING/FOLDING/ RESEATING state machine; gait strategies stay pure (phase, stride, leg) -> foot_target functions. Built side-by-side with the Python hexa_gait until the cutover. The hexa_kinematics surface is temporarily stubbed (kinematics_stub.hpp) until that package is ported.
